allow: PowerShell(docker exec my-postgres psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "\\dt")
PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "\\dt")
PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "\\d countries" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "\\d indicators" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "\\d series" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "SELECT DISTINCT region FROM countries ORDER BY region;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "SELECT DISTINCT income_group FROM countries ORDER BY income_group;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "SELECT short_name, region, income_group FROM countries c LEFT JOIN indicators i ON c.id = i.country_id WHERE i.country_id IS NULL LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "SELECT c.short_name, c.region, i.gdp_per_capita_usd, i.population FROM countries c INNER JOIN indicators i ON c.id = i.country_id WHERE i.year = 2022 AND c.region != 'Aggregates' ORDER BY i.gdp_per_capita_usd DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 8;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "SELECT c.short_name, c.region, i.gdp_per_capita_usd FROM countries c LEFT JOIN indicators i ON c.id = i.country_id AND i.year = 2022 WHERE i.country_id IS NULL LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT c.id\) FROM countries c LEFT JOIN indicators i ON c.id = i.country_id AND i.year = 2022 WHERE i.country_id IS NULL;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT year\) FROM indicators; SELECT MIN\(year\), MAX\(year\) FROM indicators;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec open-sql psql -U postgres -d worldbank -c "SELECT c.short_name, c.income_group, i.gdp_per_capita_usd, i.population FROM countries c INNER JOIN indicators i ON c.id = i.country_id WHERE i.year = 2022 AND c.region != 'Aggregates' ORDER BY c.income_group, c.short_name LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)
